name: Nicotinamide mononucleotide in prediabetic postmenopausal women
summary: A randomized placebo-controlled trial of 250 mg/day nicotinamide mononucleotide for 10 weeks in overweight or obese postmenopausal women with prediabetes.
population: Overweight or obese postmenopausal women with prediabetes

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for NAD and Redox Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, function, and safety in Overweight or obese postmenopausal women with prediabetes. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
